lines.english: Even making millions of efforts, you shall not be accepted in the Court of the Lord.
Wearing various religious robes, the fire is not extinguished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਨਾ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: anik jatan kar trisan naa dhraapai |
lines.english: You try all sorts of things, but your thirst is still not satisfied.
All other efforts are punished by the Messenger of Death,
You cannot escape to the heavens, or to the nether regions,
if you are entangled in emotional attachment and the net of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਭਜਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: govind bhajan bin til nahee maanai |
lines.english: which accepts nothing at all, except meditation on the Lord of the Universe.
O Nanak, chant it with intuitive ease. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam japat dukh jaae |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, sorrow is dispelled.
If you wish to erase your sorrows,
should commit himself to the service of the Saints.
One who prays for the four cardinal blessings

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਦ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam ridai sad gaavai |
lines.english: sing the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਤੇ ਡਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: je ko janam maran te ddarai |
lines.english: If you fear the cycle of birth and death,
If you long for honor for yourself,
then renounce your ego in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis jan kau prabh daras piaasaa |
lines.english: Those who thirst for the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਸਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kai bal bal jaasaa |5|
lines.english: - Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to them. ||5||
then seek the Sanctuary of the Holy.
shall be accounted as the highest of all.
Among all persons, the supreme person is the one
One who sees himself as lowly,
who gives up his egotistical pride in the Company of the Holy.
One who eradicates cruelty from within his own mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਚੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam tin ghatt ghatt cheenaa |
lines.english: recognizes the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਗਲ ਕੀ ਰੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa man hoe sagal kee reenaa |
lines.english: One whose mind is the dust of all,
One who looks upon pleasure and pain as one and the same,
looks upon all the world as his friend.
O Nanak, is not affected by sin or virtue. ||6||
To the dishonored, You, O God, are honor.
To the homeless, Your Name is home.
To the poor, Your Name is wealth.
You alone know Your own condition and state.
To all, You are the Giver of gifts.
O Creator Lord, Cause of causes, O Lord and Master,
Inner-knower, Searcher of all hearts:
O Nanak, no one else knows. ||7||
You Yourself, God, are imbued with Yourself.
You alone can celebrate Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ko naam jap niramal karam |
lines.english: is to chant the Name of the Lord and maintain pure conduct.
Of all religions, the best religion
Of all religious rituals, the most sublime ritual
Of all efforts, the best effort

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜੀਅ ਸਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam japahu jeea sadaa |
lines.english: is to chant the Name of the Lord in the heart, forever.
is to erase the filth of the dirty mind in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਿ ਰਸਨ ਬਖਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: har ko jas sun rasan bakhaanee |
lines.english: is to hear the Lord's Praise and chant it with the tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਥਾਨ ਤੇ ਓਹੁ ਊਤਮ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sagal thaan te ohu aootam thaan |
lines.english: Of all places, the most sublime place,
Of all speech, the most ambrosial speech

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਹ ਘਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jih ghatt vasai har naam |8|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, is that heart in which the Name of the Lord abides. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਨੀਆਰ ਇਆਨਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: niraguneeaar eaaniaa so prabh sadaa samaal |
lines.english: You worthless, ignorant fool - dwell upon God forever.
Salok:
Ashtapadee:
Think of the Glory of the All-pervading Lord, O mortal;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਰਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਬਹੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin keea tis cheet rakh naanak nibahee naal |1|
lines.english: Cherish in your consciousness the One who created you; O Nanak, He alone shall go along with you. ||1||
He who fashioned, adorned and decorated you
in the fire of the womb, He preserved you.
what is your origin, and what is your appearance?
In the flower of your youth, He gave you food, pleasure and understanding.
In your infancy, He gave you milk to drink.
As you grow old, family and friends,
